text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru... Thank you for<n>reading my
fortune the other day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, the pleasure was mine! Did you<n>succeed
in obtaining the lucky item we<n>divined? A picture
of the full moon?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
After some effort, I think I finally got<n>one. Please
have a look.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I've never seen such a radiant<n>moon!
Wait, isn't this a picture of the<n>sun?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It seems she did see the full moon. But<n>she forgot
to take a picture before bed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's right. As soon as I realized my<n>mistake, I
hurried to take a photograph<n>as quickly as I
could!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But you hurried after the moon wasgone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I spotted her on my way to morning<n>training,
desperately pointing her<n>camera at the sun. It was
a surreal sight<n>to be sure...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Still, maybe this is just me, but... I seem<n>to sense
an aura of great happiness<n>around Bright, even
though she missed<n>out on her lucky item.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's because of Dober's peach tea.<n>We
drank it together while watching the<n>sun rise, and
it was the most magical<n>experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Stop exaggerating. It's just tea—I'll make<n>you
some whenever you want.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, so it was the fragrance of a luckydrink! You must let me attend your nexttea party!
